title: Fullmetal Alchemist Brotherhood Custom GUI Pack
description: Fullmetal Alchemist Brotherhood Custom GUI Pack
body:
**![Preview Image](https://i.imgur.com/mwzjM2U.png)**

**Introduction:**
This is a GUI packed themed towards the show "Fullmetal Alchemist Brotherhood". Don't hesitate to comment down below , I have even changed hot bar as well hope you enjoy.
The palette that I choose is Red & Yellow & orange but maybe in the future.
If you guys want other colors like Blue & white or any colors else.
please tell me I will think about it! If you encounter any bugs, please report them, and I'll address them promptly.

**Feature Highlights:**
- **Settings:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/Q68LvXj.png)
- **Hud:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/SyBp0X8.png)
- **Creative Menu:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/SUtLg2Z.png)
- **Crafting Table:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/gBxOPn3.png)
- **Furnace:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/UfJWMkn.png)
- **Anvil:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/GMhiVV1.png)
- **Brewing Stand:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/JXPUO3r.png)
- **Loom:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/XyqIXY4.png)
- **Cartography Table:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/KaMgA0Z.png)
- **Shulker Box:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/CGKGzxn.png)
- **Beacon Settings:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/T6sxVHd.png)
- **Villager Trading Menu:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/NQBwn57.png)

**Community Engagement:**
Join our Discord server to suggest and vote for the next pack, participate in discussions, and have a chance to win Discord Nitro giveaways every month. [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph)

**Thank you for your support! ❤️**
